summary: Parse future Unix epoch seconds and milliseconds in Retry-After headers before treating numeric values as delta seconds.
reason: The generated helper tests cover epoch-form Retry-After values, but the parser treated any numeric string as delta seconds and capped future epoch values to 60s. This made full package tests fail even though a seven-second future epoch should resolve to roughly seven seconds.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passes for the Redfin CLI module, including TestRetryAfter_EpochSeconds and TestRetryAfter_EpochMilliseconds.
